candidates.why: Explicit total top-line revenue row; preferred as a revenue line item and matches target exactly.
Also a valid top-line revenue label; appears equal to Total Revenue and can serve as historical/fallback label.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; do not sum.
No cost of goods sold / cost of sales row is present in the provided Income Statement preview. Gross profit equals revenue in some years, which is consistent with no reported COGS line.

candidates.why: Explicit overhead/administrative expense line and clearly populated; best SG&A proxy.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is depreciation embedded in SG&A, which should be excluded from XSGA per instructions.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is depreciation within SG&A, which should be excluded from XSGA per instructions.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit SG&A-type row only, per hierarchy. Excluded depreciation-related SG&A rows and balancing rows.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; best direct match.
Depreciation component within R&D; should not replace the main R&D line for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Depreciation component within R&D; not the main R&D expense line.
Balancing row; should not be selected when the explicit R&D expense line exists.

variables.notes: Using the explicit R&D line only as a priority item; do not sum with depreciation or balancing rows.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense label, but appears specific to shareholder loans rather than total interest expense.
Interest-related but appears tied to revaluation; less clean than plain interest expense.
Direct interest expense label, but only for lease liabilities.
Direct interest expense label and the broadest among the available candidates, though it may still be partial.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Direct interest expense label, but supplemental and specific to lease liabilities.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: No single clean total interest expense line is present. Available labels appear to be component/specific interest lines rather than a consistent total interest expense item, so this priority list is a best-effort mapping and may miss some years or understate total interest expense.

candidates.why: Best available equity line and preferable to Total Equity when no separate non-controlling interest line exists.
Fallback equity label; identical to Shareholders' Equity - Total in the preview.

variables.notes: Using equity labels as a priority list. No separate non-controlling interest line is present, so BE uses total/common equity and MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: This is an income statement subtotal, not a balance sheet minority interest / non-controlling interest line.

variables.notes: No minority interest / non-controlling interest balance sheet line is present. The provided candidate is not the correct concept for MIB.
